extensionDescription.message: Add furigana reading aids to Japanese text on web pages using Sudachi morphological analysis

sizeWarning.message: Large sizes may break page layout

shortcutHint.message: Click the field, then press your desired key combination.

userDictHint.message: Override readings for proper nouns, gikun, or technical terms. Any characters are allowed.

userDictInvalidSurface.message: Word must contain at least one kanji.

optionsSubtitle.message: Configure the toggle shortcut and user dictionary.

shortcutSectionDesc.message: Press this key combination on any page to toggle furigana on or off.

userDictSectionDesc.message: Override the reading for specific words. Accepts any characters for the reading — useful for proper nouns, gikun (e.g. 超電磁砲 → レールガン), or technical terms.
